mailingAddress.street: Keep of Kaer Morhen, Blue Mountains

roles.name: Grandmaster of the School of the Wolf
roles.description: Eldest witcher of Kaer Morhen — designs the over-arching Salesforce solution and watches over its integrity.

roles.name: Castellan of the Keep
roles.description: Marshals the contract teams, holds the timeline, and answers to the Council of Mages.

roles.name: Court Scribe
roles.description: Steward of records, ledgers, layouts, fields and permission sets across the realm.

roles.name: Runesmith of Mahakam
roles.description: Forges Apex, LWC, and platform features at the dwarven anvils.

roles.name: Northern Marshal
roles.description: Captain over all Northern Salesforce craft — sets standards and guides the senior smiths.

roles.name: Senior Witcher of the Path
roles.description: Veteran of the Path — patrols the borders of customer requirements with practiced craft.

roles.name: Witcher Apprentice
roles.description: Carries discovery and configuration across the Continent under the Senior Witcher's eye.

roles.name: Portal Mage of Ban Ard
roles.description: Architect of the great spans between Salesforce and the realms beyond — bends the planar fabric.

roles.name: Senior Conduit Mage
roles.description: Lays the runes of API, middleware, and event flows under the Portal Mage's plan.

roles.name: Apprentice Conduit Mage
roles.description: Learns the craft of integration — webhooks, batch, callouts, and the dwarvish patterns of error handling.

roles.name: Trial-Master of the Grasses
roles.description: Subjects every build to the Trial — finds the maladies before they reach the contract board.

roles.name: Bardmaster of Oxenfurt
roles.description: Lifts the lute and the trumpet for product and message — leads all marketing craft across the Continent.

roles.name: Senior Bard
roles.description: Strategist of ballads — sounds the call to gather and convert audiences from Novigrad to Toussaint.

roles.name: Travelling Minstrel
roles.description: Carries the campaign forward into the field — content, creative, and the daily verse.

roles.name: Sage of Aretuza
roles.description: Records what is needed and what is promised — translates between mortal Customer and the elven craft of design.

roles.name: Master Witcher of the Wolf
roles.description: Senior smith of the Wolf School — the heaviest Apex and LWC lifts on the Path.

roles.name: Novice of the Trials
roles.description: Initiate learning the craft — paired with veterans on configuration and discovery.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts at least one month in the past — past weeks get Time Entries (Step 6), future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2-3 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set.

workstreams.name: Testing on the Isle of Mists

realms.projectName: Lodge of Sorceresses — Monster Hunt Coordination

workstreams.name: Testing in the Bog of Velen

northern-kingdoms.themedRole: Grandmaster of the School of the Wolf

lodge-of-sorceresses-monster-hunts.themedRole: Grandmaster of the School of the Wolf

northern-kingdoms.name: Council at Kaer Morhen
northern-kingdoms.description: Kickoff: the witchers gather at the keep before the season's hunts.

northern-kingdoms.name: Reforging the Silver Sword
northern-kingdoms.description: Build kickoff: the monster-bane blade reforged at the Mahakam anvils.

northern-kingdoms.name: Audience at Vizima
northern-kingdoms.description: Mid-project gate: contract review with King Foltest's court.

northern-kingdoms.name: Contract on the Striga
northern-kingdoms.description: Phase invoice trigger: the curse of the princess broken at dawn.

northern-kingdoms.name: Slaying the Last Leshy
northern-kingdoms.description: Go-Live: the final monster on the board cleared from Velen.

northern-kingdoms.name: Witcher's Hand-off
northern-kingdoms.description: Hyper-care close: the Path passed to the next generation.

nilfgaard-empire.name: Imperial Decree
nilfgaard-empire.description: Project kickoff: the Emperor signs the writ in the Golden Towers.

nilfgaard-empire.name: Sortie at Sodden Hill
nilfgaard-empire.description: Build phase: the legions advance to the discovery front.

nilfgaard-empire.name: Treaty at Cintra
nilfgaard-empire.description: UAT gate: terms accepted, banners planted.

nilfgaard-empire.name: March on Brugge
nilfgaard-empire.description: Go-Live: the Black Banner enters the conquered capital.

nilfgaard-empire.name: Coronation at the City of Golden Towers
nilfgaard-empire.description: Hyper-care close: the Emperor confirms the new viceroy.

nilfgaard-empire.name: Tribute Ledger Sealed
nilfgaard-empire.description: Final invoice: the imperial tribute counted and stamped.

cintra-elder-blood.name: Betrothal at Cintra
cintra-elder-blood.description: Discovery: the Law of Surprise invoked, lineage scope set.

cintra-elder-blood.name: Trial of the Grasses
cintra-elder-blood.description: Build: Ciri's powers awakened, registry schema confirmed.

cintra-elder-blood.name: Slaughter of Cintra Audit
cintra-elder-blood.description: Solution review: surviving heirs reconciled in the registry.

cintra-elder-blood.name: Reunion on the Isle of Mists
cintra-elder-blood.description: Go-Live: the Elder Blood lineage published to the realms.

cintra-elder-blood.name: Departure to Tor Lara
cintra-elder-blood.description: Project close: Ciri vanishes through the tower portal.

cintra-elder-blood.name: Final Lineage Reckoning
cintra-elder-blood.description: Final invoice from the Royal Treasury of Cintra.

lodge-of-sorceresses-monster-hunts.name: Convocation at Montecalvo
lodge-of-sorceresses-monster-hunts.description: Kickoff council in the Lodge's hidden tower.

lodge-of-sorceresses-monster-hunts.name: Scry the Continent
lodge-of-sorceresses-monster-hunts.description: Discovery: monster hot-spots modelled from megascope visions.

lodge-of-sorceresses-monster-hunts.name: Brew the Decoction Set
lodge-of-sorceresses-monster-hunts.description: Build: alchemy benches tooled and dashboards stocked.

lodge-of-sorceresses-monster-hunts.name: Hunt at Crookback Bog
lodge-of-sorceresses-monster-hunts.description: UAT acceptance: the Crones contract cleared in the field.

lodge-of-sorceresses-monster-hunts.name: The Wild Hunt Repelled
lodge-of-sorceresses-monster-hunts.description: Go-Live + handoff: the spectral riders driven back beyond the veil.

lodge-of-sorceresses-monster-hunts.name: Lodge Recompense
lodge-of-sorceresses-monster-hunts.description: Final invoice from the Lodge of Sorceresses.

Geralt of Rivia.notes: Roach the mare needs reshoeing — three days at the smithy.

Yennefer of Vengerberg.notes: Lilac and gooseberries — personal retreat to Vengerberg.

Triss Merigold.notes: Recovering from Sodden burns — convalescence in Maribor.

Vesemir.notes: Annual Kaer Morhen winter — keep maintenance and storytelling.

Jaskier / Dandelion.notes: Tour stop in Oxenfurt — new ballad debut at the Chameleon.

Zoltan Chivay.notes: Family in Mahakam — quarterly Gwent tournament.

Princess Cirilla / Ciri.notes: Sword forms with Vesemir — extended training at Kaer Morhen.

Queen Calanthe.notes: Inspecting the Skellige fleet at Kaer Trolde.

Mousesack.notes: Druid moot in the Skellige sacred grove.

Emperor Emhyr var Emreis.notes: Closed audience week at the City of Golden Towers.

Letho of Gulet.notes: School of the Viper retreat — Gorthur Guaer.

Philippa Eilhart.notes: Owl-form scouting over Novigrad — solo flight.

Keira Metz.notes: Cottage upgrades in Velen — new alchemy lab.

Francesca Findabair.notes: Dol Blathanna spring rites — Aen Seidhe ceremony.
